description:
An open-source ebook reader designed for immersive and deep reading experiences.

Readest is a modern, feature-rich ebook reader designed for avid readers offering seamless cross-platform access, powerful tools, and an intuitive interface to elevate your reading experience.
What's Changed
- fix: update current bookshelf after importing and deleting books by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1331
- tts: disable media session controls to keep alive tts by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1333
- feat: add an option to override book fg/bg color, closes #1328 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1335
- fix: trigger library update for the books counter after importing books by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1336
- css: auto height for single images in anchor by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1337
- css: inline image only as direct children of p and span, closes #1340 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1341
- layout: use system select widget for language selection, closes #1339 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1342
- epub: last resort to get the first image in manifest as book cover by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1343
- bump: upgrade opennext and wrangler to latest versions by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1345
- fix: avoid additional click after books is downloaded before opening by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1346
- feat: add daily translation quota of DeepL API for more sustainable service by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1349
- fix: exit select mode when all books are deleted, closes #1347 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1350
- release: version 0.9.53 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1351
Full Changelog: https://github.com/readest/readest/compare/v0.9.52...v0.9.53
